description: Product Description LouMaxx wooden hook rack impresses with its versatile uses. As a coat rack, with three long hooks, in the hallway for your jackets, coats, bags, scarves or in the bathroom as a hook rack for your towels or dressing gowns. Also great for creative, individual self-design using napkin technique, acrylic or pyrography. A highlight for "making yourself" at a children's birthday. Natural appearance and high quality. The hook rack, made of untreated pine wood, impresses with its natural look and its versatile uses in the home or office. Easy to assemble. Thanks to the two prepared holes, with a diameter of 4 mm, the wall mounting of the hook rail is no problem. Screws and dowels are not included.
